Marina will chair the meeting and has already sent the agenda.
Each action point has an owner and a deadline.
Has the remediation plan been signed off yet?

Can you allocate the follow-up to the credit desk?

Hello, Sergio. This is Marina. A quick briefing before the risk committee meeting today. I will chair, and I have already sent the agenda. There are three items. First, we recap the year: exposure climbed to a peak last year, but it has fallen since March. Second, we review the two open action points from the audit. You are the owner of one of them, so please be ready to give an update. Third, we sign off the remediation plan if the committee agrees. I have allocated ten minutes to each item, so we must keep to time. One follow-up: the credit desk has not sent the final figures yet, so we may move that point to next week. See you at nine.

Hi Sergio, it is Paulo from the credit desk. A quick note before the meeting. I have read the agenda, and I am happy with it. I finished my action point yesterday: the new control was tested, and it works. For your item, the remediation plan is ready to be signed off, so you can present it with confidence. One thing to flag: I could not join the last meeting, so I have not seen the latest minutes. Can you recap the main takeaways for me after the committee? And please allocate the follow-up on the late figures to me. Thanks, talk soon.

First, Marina opened the meeting and shared the agenda. Then the committee recapped the year and reviewed the open action points. Next, Sergio briefed the room on the remediation plan. After that, the committee signed off the plan and allocated the follow-ups. Finally, Marina recapped the main takeaways and closed the meeting.
